category_sources: source_facts.description says it controls the JACK sound server daemon; official homepage describes QjackCtl as a Qt application to control JACK.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title uses QjackCtl; source_facts.name is qjackctl.
docs_sources: Official homepage contains installation, configuration, support, and release information; official downloads page includes Git access and changelog.
repo_sources: Official QjackCtl downloads page says the project's Git repository can be checked out with git clone https://git.code.sf.net/p/qjackctl/code.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes JACK control, Qt GUI, patchbay and connection control features; source_facts.description confirms JACK sound server control.
